allow: Bash(python -c "import json; nb=json.load\(open\('checkerboard_nn_assignment.ipynb'\)\); [print\(i, c['id'], repr\(''.join\(c.get\('source',''\)[:60]\)\)\) for i,c in enumerate\(nb['cells']\)]")

Bash(python -c "import json; nb=json.load\(open\('checkerboard_nn_assignment.ipynb', encoding='utf-8'\)\); [print\(i, c['id'], repr\(''.join\(c.get\('source',''\)[:60]\)\)\) for i,c in enumerate\(nb['cells']\)]")
